title: Rether
body:
#Rether Mod by Gardon

Rether adds to our game a new island world full of new vegetation, trees, flora, nature and many new dangers in the form of hostile mobs and bosses!
The modification also consists of slightly friendlier mobs! Some of them we can even ride and tame!

#How to build a Portal?

We build it with Shroomlight and fire up Flint and Gold!

#Rether Mod About

At the beginning, after teleporting, we appear on one lonely island! To get to other islands, just find a teleporter and stand on it to teleport! I recommend drinking Golden Elixir after teleporting!
I'll leave further discovery to you, but I have to explain a few things. First of all, clicking "z" opens a special menu for the player, where we can give ourselves special skills, provided that we managed to find the right items for this and place them in the slots in the menu!

#Rether Mod Ending

Finally, I will mention that the mod requires "GeckoLib" to work and that when we decide to fight bosses, we need to be well prepared because otherwise things will be bad for us!
